h1: Gas Fireplaces, Inserts and Log Sets

paragraphs: Gas fireplaces, inserts and log sets are efficient and easy to use, giving you a cozy fire at the flip of a switch. Browse our range of gas fireplaces to find the one that fits your home and lifestyle.

Simplify your life with the ease and beauty of an indoor gas fireplace. Gather family and friends in front of bold flames and striking designs from traditional to modern and single-sided to see-through models.
Convert your old, wood-burning fireplace to an easy, efficient gas fireplace insert.

See-through gas fireplaces are the perfect way to connect your spaces, room to room or outdoor to indoor. Browse our double-sided fireplaces to enjoy ambiance from any angle with a beautiful fire at the center.
Now you can add the beauty and warmth of a contemporary fire feature with minimal remodel or disruption. A freestanding gas fireplace fits almost anywhere to elevate your space.
Add value to your home and maximize the potential of your exterior living space with an outdoor gas fire feature. Available in a range of styles and sizes to suit your landscape.

Enjoy a bold fire without the mess or hassle of burning wood. Our true-to-life vented gas fireplace log sets feature hand-painted logs molded from real wood and durable burner systems offer reliable, instant year-round enjoyment.

images.alt: Heat & Glo SLR-X AU 42" linear indoor gas fireplace with driftwood logs and Thala Beige surround in modern room near pool.
